diagrams.title: Clock Signal Waveform
diagrams.description: Shows a clock signal with period, frequency, duty cycle, and rising/falling edges labeled
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic clock parameters and terminology

diagrams.title: Setup and Hold Time Window
diagrams.description: Timing diagram showing data must be stable during setup and hold time around clock edge
diagrams.purpose: Understanding flip-flop timing constraints and metastability prevention

diagrams.title: Clock Skew Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows clock arriving at two flip-flops at different times due to path differences
diagrams.purpose: Understanding clock skew and its impact on timing analysis

diagrams.title: Clock Divider Circuit
diagrams.description: 3-stage flip-flop cascade dividing clock by 2, 4, and 8 respectively
diagrams.purpose: Understanding frequency division in clock management

diagrams.title: PLL Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Phase-Locked Loop showing feedback system for clock generation
